description: Composition Cream padded jacket made of 100% nylon on the outside, has a padded shell, 100% polyester lining, a mock neck with a full front zipper, quilted look, two zippered pockets on the sides and embroidered branding on the left hem Fitting Regular Gentle machine wash with like colours using cold water Do not bleach, dry clean or use softners Tumble dry low Do not iron For a look that's ready to face the great outdoors, this padded jacket from nike brings performance wear into the 21st century in style. The quilted look adds oodles of style while the soft blend of polyester/nylon fabric keeps you warm and comfy. Layer it over a a full sleeved T-shirt and jeans with sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M of height 5.8", Chest 32", Waist 26"
